The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to understand what the headline means. The phrase "basket case" is an idiom. From what I know, a "basket case" refers to someone who is emotionally unstable or very nervous, often to the point of being a mess. So the headline is saying that Safina started off as a basket case (emotionally unstable or very nervous) and then made it to the top of her field, becoming world number one.
